prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约580名、686名、674名、610名、637名，整体呈波动走势。2021年位次最高（580名），2022年回落至686名，2023年674名，2024年回升至610名，2025年又小幅后移至637名。近5年位次均值约637名，标准差约44名，波动幅度不大，说明该校在湖南省的生源质量较为稳定；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2025年连续5年均为52人，2026年（据招生计划文件）小幅扩招至54人，增幅约3.85%。扩招意味着竞争压力略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第7名，属于全国顶尖高校梯队，办学层次极高，对高分考生具有持续吸引力；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世引发对少年班贡献的正面回顾）；2026年周期出现个别师德负面事件，但整体声誉仍属稳健。抖音热度排名第12，评价为高热，短视频平台曝光量大，反映社会关注度居高不下。历史未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，中国科学技术大学拥有数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史等7个A+学科，以及计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程等A级学科，A-及以上学科共计19个，基础理学实力全国顶尖，对有志于科研的考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热；数学、物理学等基础学科因AI和大数据时代需求升温，报考热度上升。湖南省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年的32.0万人增长约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧了顶尖高校的竞争。；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非本省高校，在湖南省无地域招生倾斜。该校在全国招生总量中湖南省占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属于跨省招生中的中等规模省份，无特殊地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动平稳、2026年小幅扩招3.85%、湖南省物理类考生增长约8.4%以及学校声誉与热度维持高位等因素，但考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧尚未充分体现。经修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约636名，较2025年（637名）略前移1名，反映竞争小幅加剧。预测区间563–709名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 电子信息类（人工智能、电子信息工程、自动化等）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 物理学类（物理学、应用物理学、天文学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学类（智能化学与先进材料）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术、临床医学5年）
- 核工程类（工程物理、核工程与核技术）
- 空间科学与技术（深空探测）
- 行星科学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约636名，区间563–709名。位次在区间中上段（约600名以内）可重点冲刺一档拔尖计划英才班和计算机类；位次在区间中段（约600–660名）应以二档数学类、电子信息类、物理学类为主力填报；位次在区间下段（约660–709名）可考虑三档化学类、生物科学类等作为保底。中国科学技术大学专业设置以基础理学和前沿工科为主，各专业之间录取位次梯度明显，建议结合个人学科兴趣和职业规划合理搭配冲稳保。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 580, 686, 674, 610, and 637, showing a fluctuating trend. The highest ranking was in 2021 (580), dropping to 686 in 2022, 674 in 2023, recovering to 610 in 2024, and slightly falling back to 637 in 2025. The average ranking over the past 5 years is about 637, with a standard deviation of about 44, indicating relatively stable student quality. The enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hunan has been 52 students for 5 consecutive years from 2021 to 2025, and in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document) it will slightly expand to 54 students, an increase of about 3.85%. This expansion means a slight easing of competitive pressure, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Shanghai Ranking for 6 consecutive years, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with a very high academic level, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates. In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was relatively positive (the death of Mr. Li Zhengdao triggered a positive review of the contributions of the Special Class for the Gifted Young). In the 2026 cycle, there were isolated negative incidents regarding teacher ethics, but overall reputation remains stable. It ranks 12th in Douyin popularity, rated as high heat, with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high social attention. There is no historical record of significant enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the University of Science and Technology of China has 7 A+ disciplines including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, and History of Science and Technology, as well as A-level disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology and Materials Science and Engineering, with a total of 19 disciplines rated A- or above. Its strength in basic sciences is top in the country, strongly attracting candidates interested in scientific research.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular. Basic sciences like Mathematics and Physics are seeing rising application heat due to the demand from the AI and big data era. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition for top universities. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Hunan, so there is no regional enrollment preference. In the national enrollment, Hunan accounts for about 2.5% (2024 data), making it a medium-scale province in cross-provincial enrollment, with no special regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable historical ranking fluctuations, a slight 3.85% enrollment expansion in 2026, an 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan, and sustained high reputation and popularity, the intensified competition due to the increase in candidate numbers has not yet been fully reflected. After adjustment, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 636, slightly moving forward by 1 place compared to 2025 (637), reflecting a slight intensification of competition. The predicted range is 563–709.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top-notch Plan Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Top-notch Plan Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Electronic Information Class (Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information Engineering, Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Physics Class (Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Chemistry Class (Intelligent Chemistry and Advanced Materials)
- Biological Science Class (Biological Science, Biotechnology, Clinical Medicine 5-year)
- Nuclear Engineering Class (Engineering Physics, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology)
- Space Science and Technology (Deep Space Exploration)
- Planetary Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 636, with a range of 563–709. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Top-notch Plan Elite Classes and Computer Class; those in the middle part (about 600–660) should primarily apply for Tier 2 Mathematics Class, Electronic Information Class, and Physics Class; those in the lower part (about 660–709) can consider Tier 3 Chemistry Class, Biological Science Class, etc. as safety choices. The University of Science and Technology of China's majors are mainly basic sciences and cutting-edge engineering, with clear ranking gradients among majors. It is recommended to combine personal subject interests and career plans to reasonably arrange a mix of reach, match, and safety choices.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
